output: Artificial intelligence has transformed the way we interact with technology, speech recognition systems can now transcribe human speech with remarkable accuracy across dozens of languages. <en-US> This model runs entirely on Apple Silicon using the metal performance shader's backend. <en-US> No cloud connection is required, and no audio ever leaves the machine. <en-US> The cache aware streaming architecture processes each frame of audio exactly once, which makes it both fast and efficient whether you are transcribing a meeting, a lecture, or a podcast, the results are consistently strong. <en-US> Privacy is preserved because everything happens locally on your own device. <en-US>
